response.justification: While Bogdan possesses exceptional technical skills that exceed all role requirements—deep expertise in TypeScript, React, Node.js, databases, AWS, and Kubernetes, plus demonstrated commitment to clean architecture—he is dramatically overqualified. Currently a Staff Software Engineer with 15+ years of experience and multiple senior roles, he is a severe seniority mismatch for an entry-to-mid-level position designed to grow junior talent. Hiring him creates high retention risk, salary budget misalignment, and frustration for both parties—he would find the work unchallenging and likely leave within months.
strengths: Exceptional full-stack technical depth across database design, REST APIs, React, Node.js/TypeScript, AWS, and Kubernetes—exceeds every stated requirement
Proven commitment to software craftsmanship: strong TDD discipline, CI/CD practices, and mentoring through public workshops demonstrate genuine investment in code quality

Remarkable adaptability across tech stacks and problem domains—successfully shipped production systems in D, Node.js, Ember, Swift, C++, and Java, indicating ability to learn and master new technologies rapidly
concerns: Extreme seniority overqualification: currently Staff Engineer; this entry/mid-level role is several career levels below his experience—high retention risk and likely disengagement

Geographic uncertainty: resume shows frequent relocations across continents; unclear if he'll stay committed to high on-site presence requirement or may seek more senior/remote opportunities elsewhere
No explicit Nest.js mention despite strong Node.js background; all demonstrated backend experience uses vanilla Node.js or other frameworks, not the stated preference
